name: Corn & Bean Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven.
2. Stir fry onions and garlic until browned.
3. Add 3/4 of the corn, all stock, and nutmeg to the pot.
4. Bring to a boil and simmer until corn is tender.
5. Puree the remaining corn with some of the stock.
6. Add the milk powder to the puree.
7. Blend the puree into the soup pot with the beans and salt.
8. Bring the soup to almost boiling, then lower heat and simmer for a few minutes.
9. Check seasonings and serve. (Optional: Add 1-2 chopped cooked potatoes to thicken)
Makes 1 1/2 quarts
